name: Transtec AG
summary: transtec AG provides IT systems in Europe. The company offers personal computers (PCs), such as business tablets, all-in-one PCs, mini PCs, compact PCs, and silent PCs, as well as PCs for office, medical, and industrial use; workstations; and application, silent, infrastructure, datacenter, and virtualization servers. It also provides storage products; backup systems; network products, including unmanaged switches, managed switches, LAN switches, FC switches, InfiniBand switches, firewall systems, network adapters, and IoT gateways; and software solutions for data center infrastructure, such as virtualization, backup, virus protection, etc. In addition, the company offers high performance computing (HPC) solutions to calculate and simulate processes, and analyze measurement data. Its HPC solutions are used in meteorology, climatology, astro and particle physics, systems biology, genetics, and quantum chemistry or fluid mechanics areas. Further, the company provides customized systems and appliances. transtec AG was founded in 1980 and is based in Reutlingen, Germany.
